backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no functionality; backend is unused as the game runs entirely client-side.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting all implemented game features including landing page, navigation, canvas game, player controls, shooting mechanics, enemy spawning, collision detection, and scoring system.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing their roles in the Dark KillZone game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application's design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading for the Dark KillZone React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing game state toggle between hero landing page and active game canvas, with navigation and footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright, heart icon animation, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/GameCanvas.tsx: Canvas-based 2D shooter game implementing player movement (arrow keys), shooting (spacebar), enemy spawning, collision detection, score tracking, and game loop using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero landing page with background image, radial gradient overlay, animated 'ENTER THE BATTLE' title, and START GAME button.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with 'Dark KillZone' branding in red with glow effect and semi-transparent dark background with backdrop blur.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook for managing ICP backend actor creation with authentication support, query caching, and automatic invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, providing login/logout functionality and identity state management with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file as the game runs entirely client-side without backend queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a dark-themed color system using OKLCH color space, along with custom utility classes for danger colors, glow effects, animations, and game-specific styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, custom animations (accordion), and includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting the 'Dark KillZone' 2D shooter game architecture, including implemented features like canvas-based rendering, player controls, shooting mechanics, enemy spawning, and collision detection using HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript.
